content.hint: 表达‘创办’非营利组织的动词
content.template: I need this scholarship to focus on my thesis, and after graduation, I plan to ______ a nonprofit in my hometown.
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：start a nonprofit（创办非营利组织）

content.hint: 结合专业与具体职业方向，避免模糊表达
content.situation: 在奖学金面试中，面试官询问你如何将所学专业应用于未来的职业发展
content.speakerText: How do you plan to apply what you're learning to your future career?
content.speakerTextCn: 你打算如何将你所学应用到未来的职业中？
content.knowledgePoint: 将学习与职业目标明确关联
content.responseTemplate: I'm aiming to ___ after graduation, and this program gives me the skills and network to make that happen.
